nodes.label: App Wails Bridge
nodes.rationale: Thin Wails bridge with no business logic, acting as the interface between frontend and Go services.

nodes.label: Test App Factory
nodes.rationale: Centralized wiring for deterministic setup; lightweight dependency struct avoided as over-engineering for ~12 explicit dependencies.

nodes.label: Notebook Asset Handler
nodes.rationale: Implements strict path traversal protection for notebook asset serving by explicitly rejecting empty, current dir, parent dir, or multi-component paths.

nodes.label: Local Path Upload
nodes.rationale: Stores a local file selected from desktop without bridge byte-array transfer.

nodes.label: Draft Syllabus
nodes.rationale: Creates editable chapter ranges for HITL (Human-In-The-Loop) verification.

nodes.label: retrieval
nodes.description: Standalone semantic search engine wrapping ONNX + sqlite-vec.

nodes.label: Engine
nodes.description: Performs semantic search with lexical fallback.

nodes.label: SearchResult
nodes.description: Ranked chunk returned by SemanticSearch.

nodes.label: runtime
nodes.description: Manages runtime assets and native dependencies.

nodes.label: AssetValidator
nodes.description: Checks for required models, tokenizers, and extensions.

nodes.label: scheduler
nodes.description: Daily study plan generation and FSRS logic.

nodes.label: Service
nodes.description: Public interface for daily plan scheduling.

nodes.label: service
nodes.description: Implementation of scheduler service with DB dependencies.

nodes.label: NextFSRSState
nodes.description: Applies FSRS-style state transitions to flashcards.

nodes.label: study
nodes.description: Core study logic, assessment generation, and scoring.

nodes.label: StudyService
nodes.description: Orchestrates LLM-based generation and study session logic.

nodes.label: LLMProvider
nodes.description: Minimal interface for LLM tier providers.

nodes.label: buildPageBoundedContext
nodes.description: Fetches structured chunk context for a page range with token budget.

nodes.label: scaledQuizQuestionCount
nodes.description: Determines question count based on material density.

nodes.label: utils
nodes.description: General utility functions (hashing, logging).
